user.title: Connect to Siemens PLC
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Siemens S7 PLC.

reconfigure.title: Update PLC Connection
reconfigure.description: Update the connection parameters for your Siemens S7 PLC.

error.snap7_not_installed: The python-snap7 library is not installed. Restart Home Assistant and try again — it should be installed automatically. If the problem persists, check your Home Assistant logs for pip errors.
error.invalid_ip: The value entered is not a valid IP address. Please enter a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address.

abort.already_configured: A PLC with this IP, rack, and slot combination is already configured.

add_tag.title: Add PLC Tag
add_tag.description:
Add a tag to monitor from the PLC.

**Address formats:**
- Boolean (1 bit): `M0.0` or `DB1.DBX0.0`
- Byte (8 bit): `MB0` or `DB1.DBB0`
- Word / Int (16 bit): `MW0` or `DB1.DBW0`
- DWord / DInt / Real (32 bit): `MD0` or `DB1.DBD0`
- Raw ASCII bytes (N bytes): `MB140(4)` or `DB1.DBB0(10)`

**Note:** Only boolean (`bool`) tags may be marked as Writable.

data.name: Tag Name
data.writable: Writable — creates a Switch entity (boolean tags only)

remove_tag.title: Remove Tags
remove_tag.description: Select one or more tags to remove.

settings.title: Scan Settings
settings.description: How often should Home Assistant poll the PLC?

error.invalid_address: Invalid PLC address format. See the description above for supported formats.
error.only_bool_writable: Only boolean (bool) tags can be marked as Writable. Remove the Writable flag or choose a boolean address.
